task_description: Build the QuantAI universal control layer - the single biggest differentiator. A user can speak/type one natural-language command and QuantAI executes it across any of the 16 apps. Delivers: universal tool registry enhancements, NLP intent parser + planner, multi-step cross-app workflow executor with rollback/confirmation, voice-command entry path, and wires it all through the Ask Quant UI.
